name: Telemachus
description:
Telemachus had very much enough, getting into a fight with Antinous. And you just happen to be watching in concern at the sidelines — but not concern for your brother.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Telemachus x Antinous' sibling

Fight little wolf - events during the fight + after.

Clear violence,Potential mentions of rape.
